source: 33 scanned teaching pages, distilled from book_knowledge.json technique_units
learning_goal: Understand gongbi flower-and-bird fenran logic and use it to generate a faithful fenran step image from a user's original painting and baimiao draft.

definition.fenran: After baimiao and line drawing, apply thin transparent ink or color in repeated layers to establish volume, light-dark relation, object turning, front-back hierarchy, and material difference.
not_fenran: Not a repaint that changes composition or invents structure.
Not flat color fill inside line art.

global_rules: Preserve baimiao lines clearly; color must never cover or blur the line skeleton.
Use thin, transparent, low-saturation layers; build relation by gradual transitions.
Follow the original composition, object count, branch direction, leaf direction, fruit and bird placement.
Use color only to reveal structure already present in the original painting and baimiao draft.
Keep water lines around important veins or turns where the teaching pages require them.
Avoid paper texture, scan shadows, stains, background noise, or accidental printing artifacts.
The output should read as a teaching step image, not as a final completed work.

warnings: Do not paint every leaf in the same green.
Do not cover the main vein water line.

actions: 用偏灰、偏暖或偏浅的色相区分翻转叶面
warnings: Do not merge front and back leaves into one plane.
Do not make reverse leaves too saturated.

actions: 沿主枝走势建立骨架体积
在节疤、转折和遮挡处加强淡墨关系
warnings: Do not cover knots and structural turns with flat brown.

actions: 在蒂部、边缘和相交处加深关系
warnings: Do not mechanically fill the whole fruit.
Do not draw unrelated spots as lines or decoration.

actions: 按头、身、尾、胸腹关系分染
顺羽组结构做虚实变化
warnings: Do not make all fur or feathers equally dark.

actions: 必要时醒提花脉或亮部
warnings: Do not make flower veins decorative and dense.
Do not turn white powder into thick opaque paint.

object_rules.object: 石榴籽/葡萄/柑橘等颗粒果物
actions: 按颗粒中心和边缘分染
在亮部醒提蛤白或淡白
warnings: Do not average all grains into identical circles.
Do not lose overlap and depth.

short_term_method: Use the original artwork for color reference and the baimiao draft for structure lock.
Prompt the image model to produce a teaching-step fenran layer, not a final colored artwork.
Show the result to the user as a generated reference and collect failures for prompt and dataset refinement.
long_term_method: Collect paired pages and manually reviewed step images for baimiao, fenran, zhaoran-water-color, zhaoran-mineral-color, and final.
Build an evaluation set that checks structural faithfulness, line preservation, object-specific color logic, transition naturalness, and teaching usability.
Train or fine-tune a smaller specialized model or adapter for step-image generation once enough paired examples exist.
